creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-30 21:44:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-ctxtnavadd  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This plugin provides an interface (ICtxtnavAdder) to alter the ctxtnav bar of
  other plugins, most notably the wiki. For those of you asking what a ctxtnav
  bar is, its the row of links below the main navigation bar.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/CtxtnavAddPlugin
  
  PR:             ports/107269
  Submitted by:   Gerrit Beine <gerrit.beine at gmx.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1655    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/www/trac-ctxtnavadd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-ctxtnavadd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/trac-ctxtnavadd/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/www/trac-ctxtnavadd/pkg-plist (new)
